scope_note: PAC-Bayes Constant Cert v1.1: machine-tract lock for Phase-1 PAC-Bayes theory. Certifies K1=2*C^2*N*(M/2)^2 (corrected from erroneous 2*N*M^2 derivation), recomputes PAC bounds from raw (D_QA, m, delta, risk_hat) inputs using QA_DQA variant (log(1/delta) term), enforces improvement ratio 5585%->1813% (3.1x), locks DPI scope to structured_only (51.8% random-trial violation rate disclosed), and binds to Family [85] kernel via pac_kernel_ref (formula_id=PAC_BAYES_QA_DQA_LOGDELTA_V1, kernel_block_sha256=553b7588ebf8fd1b10bddcc34a03387d85a0e8089ad3319fdaa234aa7f674676).
